atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports elevated blood pressure and concerns regarding potential kidney involvement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing elevated blood pressure, which has been increasing since starting new medications prescribed by his PCP.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports consistently monitoring his blood pressure at home, noting readings as high as 170/90 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports taking his prescribed medications as directed and experiencing some mild headaches when his blood pressure is elevated.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports enjoying watching football games and consuming a significant amount of pizza, wings, and subs during football season.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasionally taking acetaminophen for minor pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a family history of hypertension and kidney disease.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is taking norvasc 10mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is taking carvedilol 25mg twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient previously took lisinopril.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs reveal a blood pressure of 169/74 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs reveal a heart rate of 88 bpm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs reveal oxygen saturation of 98%.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals no jugular venous distension.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has uncontrolled hypertension.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports possible multifactorial etiology.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports medication adjustments.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports lifestyle factors.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes cardura 4mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a renal artery ultrasound.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders morning aldosterone and 24-hour urine collections.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers to a registered dietitian.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to reduce alcohol consumption.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to maintain a log of blood pressure readings.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician schedules a follow-up appointment in three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to bring the log to the next follow-up appointment.
